zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Baillie of Lamington於1558年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，他的父親William Baillie28歲，母親N.N Home25歲。他與Grizel Hamilton結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Baillie of Lamington于1558年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥时，他的父亲William Baillie28岁，母亲N.N Home25岁。他与Grizel Hamilton结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Baillie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Older Scots baillie, baili. In Scotland, a baillie was a status name for any of various officials, including the chief magistrate in a barony and (later) the chief magistrate or administrative officer of a barony or district. Etymologically, this is the same word as English Bailey , but the functions as well as the spelling of the two officials were different in England and Scotland.
topographic name from Older Scots bailli ‘outer court of a castle’; see Bailey 3 and Bale 1.

variants.name: Bailey
meanings: English: status name for a steward or official, from Middle English bailli ‘manager, administrator’ (Old French baillis, from Late Latin baiulivus, an adjectival derivative of baiulus ‘attendant, carrier, porter’).
English: habitational name from Bailey in Little Mitton, Lancashire, named with Old English beg ‘berry’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

English: occasionally a topographic name for someone who lived by the outer wall of a castle, from Middle English (Old French) bailli ‘outer courtyard of a castle’ (Old French bail(le) ‘enclosure’, a derivative of bailer ‘to enclose’). This term became a placename in its own right, denoting a district beside a fortification or wall, as in the case of the Old Bailey in London, which formed part of the early medieval outer wall of the city.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Baillie of Lamington was born in 1558, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, William Baillie, was 28 and his mother, N.N Home, was 25. He married Grizel Hamilton. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Baillie of Lamington est né en 1558, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, William Baillie, avait 28 ans et sa mère, N.N Home, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Grizel Hamilton. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Baillie of Lamington 1558 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Baillie 28 und seine Mutter N.N Home 25. Er hat Grizel Hamilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Baillie of Lamington è nato il nel 1558 nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Baillie, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, N.N Home, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Grizel Hamilton. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Baillie of Lamingtonが1558年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで生まれた時，父William Baillieは28歳，母N.N Homeは25歳であった。Grizel Hamiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Baillie of Lamington(이)가 1558년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Baillie(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 N.N Home(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Grizel Hamilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Baillie of Lamington nasceu em 1558, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Baillie, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, N.N Home, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Grizel Hamilton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Baillie of Lamington родился в 1558 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Baillie было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали N.N Home, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Grizel Hamilton. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Baillie of Lamington nació en 1558, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, William Baillie, tenía 28 años y su mamá, N.N Home, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Grizel Hamilton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas.
